_meta.source: McLean-Pontiff 2016 (JoF) + Hou-Xue-Zhang 2020 (RFS) + Harvey-Liu-Zhu 2016 + Chen-Zimmermann 2022 (open-source asset pricing)
_meta.purpose: Phase 2 Q9 (master plan §4.4) — Replication Crisis 反例库 for negative_knowledge
_meta.selection_criteria: Published anomalies with documented post-publication decay >= 20% OR t-stat falling below Harvey-Liu-Zhu 3.0 threshold OR Hou-Xue-Zhang 2020 'not replicated' status
_meta.decay_pct_convention: negative number = post-pub Sharpe drop (e.g. -26 = 26% drop); McLean-Pontiff median is -26% in-sample, -58% out-of-sample

entries.name: accruals_sloan_1996
entries.description: Sloan (1996 TAR): firms with high accruals tend to underperform. Pre-pub annual return spread 10.4%; post-pub <2%.

entries.name: book_to_market_classic
entries.description: Fama-French value premium. Strong pre-1990, substantially decayed post-pub esp. post-2000.
entries.theoretical_anchor: Fama-French 1992 JF; HML decay documented Asness-Frazzini 2013

entries.name: momentum_12_1_jegadeesh_titman
entries.description: 12-1 momentum (skip last month). Still works but reduced; major crashes in 2009 and 2016.

entries.name: asset_growth_cooper_2008
entries.description: Cooper-Gulen-Schill 2008: firms with high asset growth underperform. Decayed substantially.

entries.name: net_share_issuance_pontiff_woodgate
entries.description: Pontiff-Woodgate 2008: net stock issuance is a robust short signal. Decay post-pub ~40%.

entries.name: profitability_novy_marx
entries.description: Novy-Marx 2013: gross profitability premium. Decayed post-2013 ~30%.

entries.name: investment_anomaly_fama_french_5
entries.description: FF5 investment factor. Conservative-minus-aggressive investment. Decay ~25% post-pub.

entries.name: idiosyncratic_volatility_ang_2006
entries.description: Ang-Hodrick-Xing-Zhang 2006: high idio vol predicts lower returns (puzzle). Hou-Xue-Zhang 2020 rated 'not replicated' in modern data.

entries.name: max_daily_return_bali_2011
entries.description: Bali-Cakici-Whitelaw 2011 MAX. Hou-Xue-Zhang 2020 rated 'not replicated' (decay >80%).

entries.name: amihud_illiquidity_2002
entries.description: Amihud 2002 illiquidity measure. Decay tied to ETF / HFT-driven liquidity provision.

entries.name: net_operating_assets_hirshleifer
entries.description: Hirshleifer-Hou-Teoh-Zhang 2004: NOA scale predicts underperformance. McLean-Pontiff -50%.

entries.name: external_financing_bradshaw_2006
entries.description: Bradshaw-Richardson-Sloan 2006: external financing predicts underperformance. McLean-Pontiff -45%.

entries.name: composite_issuance_daniel_titman
entries.description: Daniel-Titman 2006: 5-year composite issuance. Strong original; decay ~35%.

entries.name: sue_post_earnings_drift
entries.description: PEAD (Bernard-Thomas 1989). Persistent but reduced as algos trade earnings faster. Decay ~50%.

entries.name: analyst_revision_chan_jegadeesh_lakonishok
entries.description: Chan-Jegadeesh-Lakonishok 1996 analyst revisions. Substantially arbitraged away.

entries.name: insider_buying_seyhun
entries.description: Seyhun 1986/1998 insider trading. Reduced edge post Reg FD + faster info diffusion.

entries.name: short_interest_asquith_pathak_ritter
entries.description: Asquith-Pathak-Ritter 2005: high short interest predicts underperformance. Decay ~40%.

entries.name: institutional_holdings_change
entries.description: Institutional ownership change as signal. Modest decay; still partial signal.

entries.name: capital_expenditures_titman_wei_xie
entries.description: Titman-Wei-Xie 2004: high capex investment underperforms. Decay ~35%.

entries.name: rd_to_market_chan_lakonishok_sougiannis
entries.description: Chan-Lakonishok-Sougiannis 2001: R&D/M premium. Decay ~30% as analysts adjust.

entries.name: advertising_chan_lakonishok_sougiannis
entries.description: Advertising/M premium. Weakly persistent; Harvey-Liu-Zhu t-stat below 3.0 in modern data.

entries.name: inventory_growth_thomas_zhang
entries.description: Thomas-Zhang 2002: inventory growth as inefficiency signal. Decay ~40%.

entries.name: long_term_reversal_debondt_thaler
entries.description: DeBondt-Thaler 1985 5-year reversal. Largely arbitraged away post-pub.

entries.name: industry_momentum_moskowitz_grinblatt
entries.description: Moskowitz-Grinblatt 1999 industry momentum. Decay ~35% post 2000.

entries.name: low_beta_anomaly_frazzini_pedersen
entries.description: Frazzini-Pedersen BAB (Betting Against Beta). Still works but reduced; sensitive to vol regime.

entries.name: size_premium_banz_fama_french
entries.description: Size premium (Banz 1981). Substantially weaker post-1980; HXZ 2020 disputed.

entries.name: earnings_yield_basu_1977
entries.description: Basu 1977 E/P. Decayed substantially with index growth dominance post-2000.

entries.name: cash_flow_yield_lakonishok_shleifer_vishny
entries.description: LSV 1994 CF/P. Better than E/P in early periods; decayed ~40%.

entries.name: sales_growth_lakonishok_shleifer_vishny
entries.description: LSV 1994 5-year sales growth (negative predictor). Decay ~45%.

entries.name: earnings_momentum_chan_jegadeesh_lakonishok
entries.description: Chan-Jegadeesh-Lakonishok 1996 earnings momentum. Decay ~40%.

entries.name: stock_split_post_announcement_drift
entries.description: Ikenberry-Rankine-Stice 1996 post-split drift. Mostly disappeared post-decimalization.

entries.name: dividend_yield_litzenberger_ramaswamy
entries.description: Litzenberger-Ramaswamy 1979 dividend yield. Decayed ~50% post-1990; tax-driven.

entries.name: buyback_announcement_ikenberry
entries.description: Ikenberry-Lakonishok-Vermaelen 1995 buyback drift. Decay ~55%.

entries.name: spinoff_cusatis_miles_woolridge
entries.description: Cusatis-Miles-Woolridge 1993 spin-off outperformance. Largely disappeared.

entries.name: ipo_long_run_underperformance_ritter
entries.description: Ritter 1991 IPO long-run underperformance. Decay ~40% post 2000.

entries.name: seo_post_announcement_loughran_ritter
entries.description: Loughran-Ritter 1995 SEO underperformance. Decay ~50%.

entries.name: merger_acquirer_underperformance
entries.description: Acquirer long-run underperformance (Loughran-Vijh 1997). Decay ~45%.

entries.name: earnings_restatement_palmrose
entries.description: Palmrose-Richardson-Scholz 2004 restatement underperformance. Modern data: weaker.

entries.name: going_concern_audit_opinion
entries.description: Going concern opinion predicts underperformance. Faded as info diffuses quickly.

entries.name: operating_leverage_garcia_pellicer
entries.description: Operating leverage premium. Hou-Xue-Zhang 2020 rated weak; t-stat below 3.0.

entries.name: financial_leverage_bhandari
entries.description: Bhandari 1988 leverage premium. Decay; positive risk premium not consistently realized.

entries.name: quick_ratio_ou_penman
entries.description: Quick ratio as fundamental signal (Ou-Penman 1989). Largely subsumed by other factors.

entries.name: working_capital_changes_sloan_extension
entries.description: Working capital component of accruals (Sloan 1996 decomposition). Decayed.

entries.name: dividend_initiation_michaely_thaler_womack
entries.description: Michaely-Thaler-Womack 1995 dividend initiation drift. Decay ~50%.

entries.name: earnings_persistence_richardson
entries.description: Earnings persistence quality (Richardson-Sloan-Soliman-Tuna 2005). Faded.

entries.name: tax_avoidance_dyreng_hanlon_maydew
entries.description: Dyreng-Hanlon-Maydew 2008 tax avoidance. Hou-Xue-Zhang 2020 rated 'not replicated'.

entries.name: share_turnover_datar_naik_radcliffe
entries.description: Datar-Naik-Radcliffe 1998 turnover anomaly. Decayed with HFT-driven volume.

entries.name: earnings_announcement_premium_frazzini_lamont
entries.description: Frazzini-Lamont 2007 earnings announcement premium. Decay ~50% post 2010.

entries.name: 52_week_high_george_hwang
entries.description: George-Hwang 2004 52-week high anchor. Decay ~35%; subsumed by momentum.

entries.name: earnings_consistency_white_richardson
entries.description: Earnings volatility as quality. Decayed; positive but weak premium.

entries.name: cash_to_assets_palazzo_2012
entries.description: Palazzo 2012 cash holdings premium. Hou-Xue-Zhang 2020 weak replication.

entries.name: max_min_ratio_gibbons_hess
entries.description: Range-based volatility (Gibbons-Hess). Largely subsumed by std-dev measures.

entries.name: skewness_amaya_christoffersen_jacobs_vasquez
entries.description: Realized skewness premium (Amaya et al. 2015). Weak post-pub; HXZ 2020 not replicated.
